activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “She asked if the shop was open”.
activities.prompt: A: Mia asked, “Is the shop open?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: She asked if the shop was open

activities.explanation: La pregunta sí/no usa «if» y orden afirmativo.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “He asked where the exit was”.
activities.prompt: A: Leo asked, “Where is the exit?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: He asked where the exit was

activities.explanation: Tras «where» usamos orden afirmativo.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “He told us to wait outside”.
activities.prompt: A: The guard said, “Wait outside.” B: ___

evaluator.answer: He told us to wait outside

activities.explanation: La instrucción usa «told us to wait».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “She asked me to help her”.
activities.prompt: A: Nora said, “Please help me.” B: ___

evaluator.answer: She asked me to help her

activities.explanation: La petición usa «asked me to» y adapta el pronombre.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “She told me not to touch it”.
activities.prompt: A: The technician said, “Don't touch it.” B: ___

evaluator.answer: She told me not to touch it

activities.explanation: La orden negativa usa «not to».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “He asked me if I needed a receipt”.
activities.prompt: A: The cashier asked, “Do you need a receipt?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: He asked me if I needed a receipt

activities.explanation: Se elimina «do» y se usa «if I needed».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “She asked why the gate was locked”.
activities.prompt: A: Rina asked, “Why is the gate locked?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: She asked why the gate was locked

activities.explanation: La pregunta reportada mantiene «why» y usa orden afirmativo.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “She told me to keep the receipt”.
activities.prompt: A: The assistant said, “Keep the receipt.” B: ___

evaluator.answer: She told me to keep the receipt

activities.explanation: La instrucción usa «told me to keep».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “I asked her to speak more slowly”.
activities.prompt: A: You said to the guide, Ms Patel, “Please speak more slowly.” B: ___

evaluator.answer: I asked her to speak more slowly

activities.explanation: La petición a Ms Patel se informa con «asked her to».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “She asked me if I could swim”.
activities.prompt: A: Ana asked, “Can you swim?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: She asked me if I could swim

activities.explanation: Es una pregunta de capacidad, no una petición.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “They asked when the meeting had started”.
activities.prompt: A: They asked, “When did the meeting start?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: They asked when the meeting had started

activities.explanation: Se elimina «did» y se usa past perfect.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “Jo asked whether the parcel had arrived”.
activities.prompt: A: Jo asked, “Has the parcel arrived?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: Jo asked whether the parcel had arrived

activities.explanation: Present perfect pasa a past perfect tras «whether».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “He told us not to block the doorway”.
activities.prompt: A: The marshal said, “Don't block the doorway.” B: ___

evaluator.answer: He told us not to block the doorway

activities.explanation: La instrucción negativa usa «told us not to».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “She asked me not to mention her address”.
activities.prompt: A: Maya said, “Please don't mention my address.” B: ___

evaluator.answer: She asked me not to mention her address

activities.explanation: La petición negativa usa «asked me not to».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “Sara asked Leo to open the window”.
activities.prompt: A: Sara said, “Could you open the window, please, Leo?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: Sara asked Leo to open the window

activities.explanation: La pregunta cortés funciona como petición de acción.

activities.instructions: Complete B's later report with “Nina asked Omar whether he would be there the next day”.
activities.prompt: A: Nina asked Omar, “Will you be here tomorrow?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: Nina asked Omar whether he would be there the next day

activities.explanation: Cambian orden, modal, pronombre, lugar y tiempo.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “Amir asked Lena where she had put those keys”.
activities.prompt: A: Amir asked Lena, “Where did you put these keys?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: Amir asked Lena where she had put those keys

activities.explanation: Se eliminan inversión y «did» y cambian pronombre, tiempo y demostrativo.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “Eva asked who had called me”.
activities.prompt: A: Eva asked me, “Who called you?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: Eva asked who had called me

activities.explanation: «Who» sigue siendo sujeto y «you» se refiere a la persona que informa: «me».

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “The manager asked me if I could help”.
activities.prompt: A: Did the manager ask about your availability? B: Yes. ___

evaluator.answer: The manager asked me if I could help

activities.explanation: La estructura pregunta por disponibilidad.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “The manager asked me to help”.
activities.prompt: A: Did the manager request your assistance? B: Yes. ___

evaluator.answer: The manager asked me to help

activities.explanation: La estructura solicita una acción.

activities.instructions: Complete B's later report with “Rina asked Leo to bring those folders there the next day”.
activities.prompt: A: Rina asked Leo, “Can you bring these folders here tomorrow?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: Rina asked Leo to bring those folders there the next day

activities.explanation: La petición adapta demostrativo, lugar y tiempo.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “Nora asked Sam why he hadn't sent her the revised figures”.
activities.prompt: A: Nora asked Sam, “Why haven't you sent me the revised figures?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: Nora asked Sam why he hadn't sent her the revised figures

activities.explanation: Se usa orden afirmativo, past perfect negativo y pronombres adaptados.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “The guide told us to stay together and not to cross the rope”.
activities.prompt: A: The guide said, “Stay together, and don't cross the rope.” B: ___

evaluator.answer: The guide told us to stay together and not to cross the rope

activities.explanation: Una misma estructura informa de la instrucción afirmativa y la negativa.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “The customer asked whether or not the fee was refundable”.
activities.prompt: A: The customer asked, “Is the fee refundable?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: The customer asked whether or not the fee was refundable

activities.explanation: «Whether or not» introduce la pregunta cerrada con orden afirmativo.

activities.instructions: Complete B's report with “Ana asked me if I could drive, then asked me to drive her home”.
activities.prompt: A: Ana first asked, “Can you drive?” Then: “Could you drive me home, please?” B: ___

evaluator.answer: Ana asked me if I could drive, then asked me to drive her home

activities.explanation: La primera frase pregunta capacidad; la segunda solicita una acción.
